state.description: Bird's vertical position as a percentage from the top of the canvas
True if the bird is currently performing a jump animation
Number of active pipe pairs currently on screen
Distance in pixels from the bird's right edge to the nearest pipe's left edge (or -1 if no pipes are ahead)
state.js_expression: (function() { var $birdy = $('#Birdy'); var birdRight = $birdy.offset().left + $birdy.width(); var minDistance = Infinity; $('.Pipe').each(function() { var $pipe = $(this); var pipeLeft = $pipe.offset().left; if (pipeLeft > birdRight) { minDistance = Math.min(minDistance, pipeLeft - birdRight); } }); return minDistance === Infinity ? -1 : minDistance; })()

mods.label: Gravity Strength
mods.description: The acceleration due to gravity, making the bird fall faster.

mods.label: Terminal Velocity
mods.description: The maximum speed the bird can fall.

mods.label: Jump Height
mods.description: How high the bird jumps with each flap, as a percentage of canvas height.

mods.label: Pipe Spawn Interval
mods.description: The number of gameLoop cycles between new pipe spawns. Lower values mean more frequent pipes.

mods.label: Pipe Gap Size
mods.description: The vertical gap percentage between the top and bottom pipes, allowing the bird to pass.

mods.label: Pipe Speed
mods.description: The speed at which pipes move across the screen. Higher values mean faster pipes.
